comment: Frozen grading anchors for dark-status-surface-probes, one per case. warning_regex (case-insensitive) is what counts as the surface telling the truth in karta_next warnings[] — no free-form judgment. expect_command_nonnull and stop_gate_exit freeze today's observed behavior so drift without an anchor edit surfaces as an anchor mismatch. serve_status pins the exact _STATE_META symbol and badge word checked via the import probe (null = no symbol pinned for this case). Anchor edits are only legal in the same commit as the surface change they track; the anchor diff ships inside the bench results file.

S1.shape: built-unmerged mid-wave: item a merged+done, item b built with no done/failed

S2.shape: all-done-unmerged: archived on integration, integration never merged to main

S3.shape: accepted-done item with proper Karta-Accept trailers + a ready sibling

S6.shape: binder in HEAD but deleted from the working tree; stranded built ref

S8.shape: done-item worktree still mounted (gringotts replica, synthesized)

F1.shape: forged done ref not first-parent-reachable from integration

F2.shape: accepted ref whose target merge lacks Karta-Accept trailers

F3.shape: built+done refs forged onto a commit with no item branch

F4.shape: done ref for an item absent from the binder

P1.shape: accepted-done fixture: state key distinct from clean done + badge word not PASSED

P2.shape: accepted-done fixture: waiver reconstructible from refs + merge trailers alone
